_comment: Coder-Next coprocessor, MAC-HEAVY topology (2026-06-12, vision-on-mac migration). ROOT CAUSE of the box crashes (beads 081/akf): coder-box(49GB)+vision-35B(21GB) co-residency exhausted the box's ~106GB Vulkan -> uncaught vk alloc -> abort 0xc0000409. FIX: split the two big jobs across machines. BOX runs coder-box ALONE (no co-residency -> stable agentic). MAC runs vision (Qwen2.5-VL-7B, mlx_vlm) + the 35B (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, mlx_lm, general/reasoning) co-resident — fits comfortably (~25GB weights, 44GB free) where 3 models (coder+vision+35B) swapped. Routing (src/backends.ts): agentic coding -> coder-box; qwen_chat role=code -> coder-box; role=general/reasoning -> reason-mac; qwen_oneshot_vision -> vision-mac; tokenize -> coder-box (llama.cpp); embed/rerank -> local bge.

backends._comment: THE coder. Coder-Next on the box (qwentescence, llama.cpp b9596 Vulkan), now running ALONE (vision/35B moved to the Mac) so no co-residency VRAM pressure -> the 081/akf abort does not recur. Serves agentic coding (qwen_spawn/oneshot), role=code, and unpinned tokenize (only llama.cpp backend with /tokenize).

Vision on the Mac (MLX, M4 Max, mlx_vlm server :8083). Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit. Replaces the box 35B+mmproj for vision/OCR — faster (546 vs 256 GB/s) and off the box. vision_only: dedicated vision — kept out of the agentic text/chat pool so coding never routes to a VL model.

The 35B on the Mac (MLX, mlx_lm server :8084). Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-4bit (the same model that was on the box, moved). Reasoning/general operator backend via role=general/reasoning. no_agentic: it is a reasoning model, not the coder, so keep it out of the agentic coding pool. no_tokenize: MLX has no /tokenize. NOTE: thinking model — needs generous max_tokens (>=800) or no_think for short answers.
